---
params:
  county: "Salt Lake"
  data_dir: "data/remotes"
  map_cache_dir: "data/map_cache"
format:
  typst:
    margin:
      x: 0.4in
      y: 0.35in
    fontsize: 8pt
---

```{=typst}
#set page(flipped: true)
#set text(font: "Poppins", size: 8pt, number-type: "lining", number-width: "tabular")
#set par(spacing: 0pt, leading: 0.5em)
```

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(yaml)

settings    <- yaml::read_yaml("config/settings.yml")
report_data <- readRDS(file.path(params$data_dir, "report_data.rds"))
tract_maps  <- readRDS(file.path(params$data_dir, "tract_maps.rds"))

county_data <- dplyr::filter(report_data, county == params$county) |>
  dplyr::arrange(GEOID)

county_maps <- tract_maps[county_data$GEOID]
```

```{r}
#| label: save-maps
#| include: false
map_dir <- params$map_cache_dir
dir.create(map_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

map_paths <- purrr::imap_chr(county_maps, function(map, geoid) {
  path <- file.path(map_dir, paste0("d_", geoid, ".png"))
  ggplot2::ggsave(
    filename = path,
    plot     = map,
    width    = settings$map_width_in,
    height   = settings$map_height_in,
    dpi      = 200,
    bg       = "white"
  )
  path
})

# ── Per-tract donut charts (one segment per WC center type, MUorC % in center) ─
ct_specs <- list(
  list(col = "wc_pct_metropolitan_center", color = "#bc5f8c"),
  list(col = "wc_pct_urban_center",        color = "#ec8369"),
  list(col = "wc_pct_city_center",         color = "#f5b86e"),
  list(col = "wc_pct_neighborhood_center", color = "#fae55c"),
  list(col = "wc_pct_employment_district", color = "#d4a5c9"),
  list(col = "wc_pct_industrial_district", color = "#b8a8d8"),
  list(col = "wc_pct_retail_district",     color = "#f4b8bb")
)

donut_paths <- purrr::set_names(
  purrr::map_chr(county_data$GEOID, function(geoid) {
    path     <- file.path(map_dir, paste0("cv_", geoid, ".svg"))
    row_data <- county_data[county_data$GEOID == geoid, ]
    pcts <- vapply(ct_specs, function(d)
      if (d$col %in% names(row_data)) max(as.numeric(row_data[[d$col]]), 0, na.rm = TRUE) else 0,
      numeric(1))
    clrs      <- vapply(ct_specs, function(d) d$color, character(1))
    muc_total <- round(sum(pcts[1:3], na.rm = TRUE))
    remaining <- max(100 - sum(pcts, na.rm = TRUE), 0)

    vals <- c(pcts, remaining)
    cols <- c(clrs, "#DDD5CC")
    keep <- vals > 0.5
    pd   <- if (!any(keep)) {
      data.frame(value = 100, color = "#DDD5CC", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    } else {
      data.frame(value = vals[keep], color = cols[keep], stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    }

    p <- ggplot2::ggplot(pd, ggplot2::aes(x = 2, y = value, fill = color)) +
      ggplot2::geom_col(color = NA, width = 1) +
      ggplot2::coord_polar(theta = "y", start = -pi / 2) +
      ggplot2::xlim(0.5, 2.6) +
      ggplot2::scale_fill_identity() +
      ggplot2::annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0,
        label = paste0(muc_total, "%"),
        size = 4.2, fontface = "bold", color = "#003B4F", vjust = 0.5) +
      ggplot2::annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0,
        label = "MUorC", size = 2.5, color = "#7A848A", vjust = -1.8) +
      ggplot2::theme_void() +
      ggplot2::theme(
        plot.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "#F7FAFB", color = NA),
        plot.margin     = ggplot2::margin(4, 4, 4, 4)
      )
    suppressWarnings(
      ggplot2::ggsave(filename = path, plot = p,
                      width = 1.8, height = 1.8, device = svglite::svglite, bg = "#F7FAFB")
    )
    path
  }),
  county_data$GEOID
)

# ── Per-tract ATO gauge SVGs (270° arc, gap at upper-right, matching reference) ──
gauge_svg <- function(ato_val,
                      sz       = 200L,
                      sw       = 22L,
                      fill_col  = "#0E5C72",
                      track_col = "#E4ECEE",
                      text_col  = "#16272D") {
  frac <- max(0, min(1, as.numeric(ato_val) / 100))
  cx <- sz / 2; cy <- sz / 2; r <- (sz - sw) / 2
  # Angle convention: degrees CW from 12-o'clock, matching JSX reference
  # start=135 → 4-5 o'clock; start+270 → 1-2 o'clock; gap on right side
  to_xy <- function(deg) {
    a <- (deg - 90) * pi / 180
    c(cx + r * cos(a), cy + r * sin(a))
  }
  arc_d <- function(a0, a1) {
    p0 <- to_xy(a0); p1 <- to_xy(a1)
    large <- if ((a1 - a0) %% 360 > 180) 1L else 0L
    sprintf("M %.3f %.3f A %.3f %.3f 0 %d 1 %.3f %.3f",
            p0[1], p0[2], r, r, large, p1[1], p1[2])
  }
  track <- arc_d(135, 135 + 270)
  fill  <- if (frac > 0.001) arc_d(135, 135 + 270 * frac) else NULL
  fsz   <- round(sz * 0.28)
  lbl   <- as.character(round(as.numeric(ato_val), 1))
  paste(c(
    sprintf('<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 %d %d">', sz, sz),
    sprintf('  <path d="%s" fill="none" stroke="%s" stroke-width="%d" stroke-linecap="round"/>', track, track_col, sw),
    if (!is.null(fill))
      sprintf('  <path d="%s" fill="none" stroke="%s" stroke-width="%d" stroke-linecap="round"/>', fill, fill_col, sw),
    sprintf('  <text x="%.1f" y="%.1f" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central" font-family="Poppins,sans-serif" font-weight="700" font-size="%d" fill="%s">%s</text>',
            cx, cy, fsz, text_col, lbl),
    '</svg>'
  ), collapse = "\n")
}

gauge_paths <- purrr::set_names(
  purrr::map_chr(county_data$GEOID, function(geoid) {
    path    <- file.path(map_dir, paste0("ga_", geoid, ".svg"))
    ato_val <- as.numeric(county_data[county_data$GEOID == geoid, "ato_composite"])
    if (is.na(ato_val) || !is.finite(ato_val)) ato_val <- 0
    writeLines(gauge_svg(ato_val), path)
    path
  }),
  county_data$GEOID
)

# ── FKM card icons: static FontAwesome SVGs committed to assets/icons/ ──────────
# Font Awesome Free 7.2.0 — CC BY 4.0 — https://fontawesome.com/license/free
icon_wc_path      <- "assets/icons/icon_wc.svg"
icon_ato_path     <- "assets/icons/icon_ato.svg"
icon_sap_path     <- "assets/icons/icon_sap.svg"
icon_eru_path     <- "assets/icons/icon_eru.svg"
icon_transit_path   <- "assets/icons/icon_sap.svg"
icon_auto_path      <- "assets/icons/icon_auto.svg"
icon_profile_path   <- "assets/icons/icon_profile.svg"
icon_housing_path   <- "assets/icons/icon_housing.svg"
icon_eru_panel_path <- "assets/icons/icon_eru_blue.svg"

icon_paths <- list(wc        = icon_wc_path,
                   ato       = icon_ato_path,
                   sap       = icon_sap_path,
                   eru       = icon_eru_path,
                   transit   = icon_transit_path,
                   auto      = icon_auto_path,
                   profile   = icon_profile_path,
                   housing   = icon_housing_path,
                   eru_panel = icon_eru_panel_path)
```

```{r}
#| label: pages
#| results: asis
#| echo: false

# ── Palette ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
teal       <- "#003B4F"
teal_mid   <- "#0E5C72"
teal_soft  <- "#3E7E91"
sky        <- "#7EC8E3"
amber      <- "#C77B30"
key_tint   <- "#F1F7F8"
panel_fill <- "#F7FAFB"
line_cool  <- "#CADDE2"
hair       <- "#EEF3F4"
ink        <- "#16272D"
body_c     <- "#3C4A4F"
muted_c    <- "#7A848A"
track      <- "#E4ECEE"

# ── Generic helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fmt_val <- function(x, digits = 1, suffix = "", big_mark = "") {
  if (length(x) == 0 || is.na(x)) return("—")
  if (is.numeric(x) && !is.finite(x)) return("—")
  rounded <- round(x, digits)
  if (digits == 0 && nchar(big_mark) > 0) {
    return(paste0(format(as.integer(rounded), big.mark = big_mark, scientific = FALSE), suffix))
  }
  paste0(format(rounded, scientific = FALSE), suffix)
}

tract_label <- function(geoid) {
  sfx  <- substr(as.character(geoid), 6, 11)
  base <- as.integer(substr(sfx, 1, 4))
  dec  <- substr(sfx, 5, 6)
  if (dec == "00") paste0("Tract ", base) else paste0("Tract ", base, ".", dec)
}

fmt_plus <- function(x, digits = 0, m = "") {
  if (is.na(x) || !is.finite(as.numeric(x))) return("—")
  val <- as.numeric(x)
  if (digits == 0 && nchar(m) > 0) {
    formatted <- format(as.integer(abs(round(val))), big.mark = m, scientific = FALSE)
  } else {
    formatted <- format(round(abs(val), digits), scientific = FALSE)
  }
  if (val >= 0) paste0("+", formatted) else paste0("-", formatted)
}

col_val <- function(data, col) {
  if (col %in% names(data)) data[[col]] else NA_real_
}

oz_color <- function(cls) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    grepl("Likely to attract",   cls, ignore.case = TRUE) &
      !grepl("More|Less|Un",     cls, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "#15705A",
    grepl("More likely",         cls, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "#2F8FB0",
    grepl("Less likely",         cls, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "#D98A3D",
    grepl("Unlikely|not likely", cls, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "#B4532E",
    TRUE ~ "#9AA3A8"
  )
}

oz_class_short <- function(cls) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    grepl("Likely to attract",   cls, ignore.case = TRUE) &
      !grepl("More|Less|Un",     cls, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Likely",
    grepl("More likely",         cls, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "More Likely",
    grepl("Less likely",         cls, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Less Likely",
    grepl("Unlikely|not likely", cls, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Unlikely",
    TRUE ~ "Unknown"
  )
}

# ── Typst building blocks ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# Horizontal progress bar — pure paste0, no sprintf %
tbar <- function(pct_val, bar_color, h = "4pt", r = "2pt") {
  if (is.null(pct_val) || is.na(pct_val) || !is.finite(as.numeric(pct_val))) {
    return(paste0('#block(width: 100%, height: ', h, ', fill: rgb("', track, '"), radius: ', r, ')[]'))
  }
  fp  <- min(max(as.numeric(pct_val), 0), 100)
  fpp <- paste0(format(round(fp, 1), nsmall = 1), "%")   # e.g. "34.7%"
  paste0(
    '#block(width: 100%, height: ', h, ', fill: rgb("', track, '"), radius: ', r, ')',
    '[#block(width: ', fpp, ', height: ', h, ', fill: rgb("', bar_color, '"), radius: ', r, ')[]]'
  )
}

# Panel section header: optional icon + teal uppercase + cool hairline
phdr <- function(label, icon_path = NULL) {
  label_text <- paste0(
    '#text(fill: rgb("', teal, '"), weight: "bold", size: 7pt, tracking: 0.6pt)[',
    toupper(label), ']'
  )
  inner <- if (!is.null(icon_path)) {
    paste0(
      '#grid(columns: (auto, 1fr), gutter: 4pt, align: left + horizon,',
      '[#image("', icon_path, '", width: 9pt, height: 9pt)],',
      '[', label_text, '])'
    )
  } else {
    label_text
  }
  paste0(
    '#block(width: 100%, inset: (x: 6pt, top: 4pt, bottom: 0pt), below: 0pt)',
    '[', inner, ']',
    '#v(1pt)',
    '#line(length: 100%, stroke: (paint: rgb("', line_cool, '"), thickness: 0.75pt))'
  )
}

# KV row: label left / value right, hairline below
mkv <- function(label, value) {
  paste0(
    '#block(inset: (x: 6pt, y: 2.5pt), width: 100%)',
    '[#grid(columns: (1fr, auto), gutter: 2pt,',
    '[#text(fill: rgb("', body_c, '"), size: 6.5pt)[', label, ']],',
    '[#text(fill: rgb("', ink,    '"), size: 8pt, weight: "semibold")[', value, ']])]',
    '#line(length: 100%, stroke: (paint: rgb("', hair, '"), thickness: 0.5pt))'
  )
}

# KV row with bar below label/value
mkv_bar <- function(label, value, bar_pct, bar_color = teal) {
  paste0(
    '#block(inset: (x: 6pt, top: 2pt, bottom: 1pt), width: 100%)',
    '[#grid(columns: (1fr, auto), gutter: 2pt,',
    '[#text(fill: rgb("', body_c, '"), size: 6.5pt)[', label, ']],',
    '[#text(fill: rgb("', ink,    '"), size: 8pt, weight: "semibold")[', value, ']])',
    '#v(1.5pt)', tbar(bar_pct, bar_color), ']',
    '#line(length: 100%, stroke: (paint: rgb("', hair, '"), thickness: 0.5pt))'
  )
}

# Panel box wrapper: panel-fill background, cool border, 5pt radius
panel_box <- function(header_str, body_str, fill_h = FALSE) {
  h_attr <- if (fill_h) ", height: 100%" else ""
  paste0(
    '#block(fill: rgb("', panel_fill, '"), ',
    'stroke: (paint: rgb("', line_cool, '"), thickness: 0.75pt), ',
    'radius: 5pt, inset: 0pt, clip: true, width: 100%', h_attr, ')',
    '[', header_str, body_str, ']'
  )
}

# Key measure card for the Four Key Measures band
key_card <- function(top_color, label_upper, value_str, unit_str, bar_pct_val, caption_str, bar_color, icon_fwd = NULL) {
  fp  <- if (!is.null(bar_pct_val) && !is.na(bar_pct_val) && is.finite(as.numeric(bar_pct_val)))
           min(max(as.numeric(bar_pct_val), 0), 100) else NULL
  bar_t <- if (!is.null(fp)) {
    fpp <- paste0(format(round(fp, 1), nsmall = 1), "%")
    paste0(
      '#block(width: 100%, height: 5pt, fill: rgb("', track, '"), radius: 2pt)',
      '[#block(width: ', fpp, ', height: 5pt, fill: rgb("', bar_color, '"), radius: 2pt)[]]'
    )
  } else {
    paste0('#block(width: 100%, height: 5pt, fill: rgb("', track, '"), radius: 2pt)[]')
  }
  unit_t <- if (nchar(unit_str) > 0)
    paste0('#h(3pt)#text(fill: rgb("', body_c, '"), size: 10pt, baseline: -2pt)[', unit_str, ']')
  else ""
  lbl_t  <- paste0('#text(fill: rgb("', teal, '"), size: 7pt, weight: "bold", tracking: 0.6pt)[', label_upper, ']')
  hdr_t  <- if (!is.null(icon_fwd))
    paste0('#grid(columns: (12pt, 1fr), gutter: 4pt, align: left + horizon,',
           '[#image("', icon_fwd, '", width: 12pt, height: 12pt)],[', lbl_t, '])')
  else lbl_t

  paste0(
    '#block(fill: rgb("', key_tint, '"), stroke: 0.75pt + rgb("', line_cool, '"), ',
    'radius: 5pt, inset: 0pt, clip: true, width: 100%, height: 100%)',
    '[#block(height: 3pt, width: 100%, fill: rgb("', top_color, '"))[]',
    '#block(inset: (x: 8pt, top: 6pt, bottom: 2pt), width: 100%)',
    '[', hdr_t,
    '#v(5pt)',
    '#text(fill: rgb("', ink, '"), size: 26pt, weight: "bold")[', value_str, ']',
    unit_t,
    '#v(8pt)',
    bar_t,
    '#v(2pt)',
    '#text(fill: rgb("', muted_c, '"), size: 6.5pt)[', caption_str, ']',
    ']]'
  )
}

# Gauge card for ATO (ring image left + caption text right, no big number)
gauge_card <- function(top_color, label_upper, gauge_img_path, caption_str, icon_fwd = NULL) {
  lbl_t <- paste0('#text(fill: rgb("', teal, '"), size: 7pt, weight: "bold", tracking: 0.6pt)[', label_upper, ']')
  hdr_t <- if (!is.null(icon_fwd))
    paste0('#grid(columns: (12pt, 1fr), gutter: 4pt, align: left + horizon,',
           '[#image("', icon_fwd, '", width: 12pt, height: 12pt)],[', lbl_t, '])')
  else lbl_t
  paste0(
    '#block(fill: rgb("', key_tint, '"), stroke: 0.75pt + rgb("', line_cool, '"), ',
    'radius: 5pt, inset: 0pt, clip: true, width: 100%, height: 100%)',
    '[#block(height: 3pt, width: 100%, fill: rgb("', top_color, '"))[]',
    '#block(inset: (x: 8pt, top: 6pt, bottom: 7pt), width: 100%)',
    '[', hdr_t,
    '#v(5pt)',
    '#grid(columns: (auto, 1fr), gutter: 8pt, align: horizon,',
    '[#image("', gauge_img_path, '", width: 40pt, height: 40pt)],',
    '[#text(fill: rgb("', muted_c, '"), size: 6.5pt)[', caption_str, ']]',
    ')]]'
  )
}

# ── Resolve static icon paths once (shared across all tract pages) ─────────────
icon_fwd_list <- local({
  pr_ <- gsub("\\\\", "/", normalizePath(getwd()))
  lapply(icon_paths, function(p) {
    sub(paste0("^", pr_, "/?"), "", gsub("\\\\", "/", normalizePath(p)))
  })
})

# ── Per-tract page generator ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
tract_page <- function(tract, map_path, donut_path, is_first) {
  g  <- function(col)                          col_val(tract, col)
  fv <- function(col, d = 1, s = "", m = "")  fmt_val(g(col), d, s, m)

  county_str <- as.character(g("county"))
  geoid_str  <- as.character(g("GEOID"))
  acres_str  <- fv("total_acres", 0, m = ",")

  oz_cls_raw    <- if (is.na(g("oztoolclassification"))) NA_character_
                   else as.character(g("oztoolclassification"))
  oz_fill       <- if (is.na(oz_cls_raw)) paste0('"', muted_c, '"')
                   else paste0('"', oz_color(oz_cls_raw), '"')
  oz_lbl        <- if (is.na(oz_cls_raw)) "N/A" else oz_class_short(oz_cls_raw)

  mfi_raw <- g("mfi")
  mfi_str <- if (is.na(mfi_raw) || !is.finite(as.numeric(mfi_raw))) "—"
             else paste0("\\$", format(as.integer(mfi_raw), big.mark = ",", scientific = FALSE))

  pvrty_str <- if (is.na(g("pvrty_r"))) "—" else as.character(g("pvrty_r"))
  unmpl_str <- if (is.na(g("unmpl_r"))) "—" else as.character(g("unmpl_r"))

  pb <- if (!is_first) "#pagebreak()\n" else ""

  proj_root  <- gsub("\\\\", "/", normalizePath(getwd()))
  map_abs    <- gsub("\\\\", "/", normalizePath(map_path))
  map_fwd    <- sub(paste0("^", proj_root, "/?"), "", map_abs)
  donut_abs  <- gsub("\\\\", "/", normalizePath(donut_path))
  donut_fwd  <- sub(paste0("^", proj_root, "/?"), "", donut_abs)
  gauge_abs  <- gsub("\\\\", "/", normalizePath(gauge_paths[[geoid_str]]))
  gauge_fwd  <- sub(paste0("^", proj_root, "/?"), "", gauge_abs)

  # ── Header band (summary-style) ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  hdr_right <- paste0(
    '#align(right + horizon)',
    '[#text(fill: rgb("', sky, '"), size: 5.5pt, tracking: 1pt)[INVESTMENT LIKELIHOOD]',
    '#linebreak()#v(3pt)',
    '#box(fill: rgb(', oz_fill, '), radius: 3pt, inset: (x: 8pt, y: 4pt))',
    '[#text(fill: white, weight: "bold", size: 8pt)[', oz_lbl, ']]',
    '#linebreak()#v(2pt)',
    '#text(fill: rgb("', sky, '"), size: 5.5pt)[Urban Institute OZ Tool]',
    ']'
  )
  hdr_band <- paste0(
    '#block(width: 100%, fill: rgb("', teal, '"), inset: (x: 0.15in, y: 0.21in), radius: 6pt, below: 0pt)',
    '[',
    '#place(right + horizon)[', hdr_right, ']',
    '#grid(columns: (auto, 1fr), gutter: 0.07in, align: left + horizon,',
    '[#rect(fill: none, stroke: (paint: rgb("', sky, '"), thickness: 0.5pt), inset: (x: 6pt, y: 5pt), radius: 2pt)',
    '[#align(center)[#text(fill: rgb("', sky, '"), weight: "bold", size: 6pt)[WFRC#linebreak()MAG]]]],',
    '[#stack(dir: ttb, spacing: 6pt,',
    '[#text(fill: white, weight: "bold", size: 16pt)[', county_str, ' County]',
    '#h(6pt)#text(fill: rgb("', sky, '"), size: 8pt)[Opportunity Zone 2.0]],',
    '[#text(fill: rgb("', sky, '"), size: 7pt)[Census Tract ', geoid_str, ' · ', tract_label(geoid_str), ' · ', acres_str, ' acres]]',
    ')]',
    ')]'
  )

  sky_rule <- paste0(
    '#line(length: 100%, stroke: (paint: rgb("', sky, '"), thickness: 1.5pt))'
  )

  # ── Four Key Measures band ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  muc_pct <- g("wc_muc_pct")
  ato_val <- g("ato_composite")
  sap_val <- g("sap_planned_hh_per_acre")
  eru_val <- g("eru_per_acre")

  sap_bar <- if (!is.na(sap_val) && is.finite(sap_val)) min(sap_val / 35 * 100, 100) else NA_real_
  eru_bar <- if (!is.na(eru_val) && is.finite(eru_val)) min(eru_val / 10 * 100, 100) else NA_real_

  c1 <- key_card(teal,      "WASATCH CHOICE CENTERS",   fv("wc_muc_pct", 1),              "%",     muc_pct, "% of tract in metro / urban / city center", teal,      icon_fwd_list$wc)
  c2 <- gauge_card(teal_mid, "ACCESS TO OPPORTUNITIES", gauge_fwd, "composite drive + transit index", icon_fwd_list$ato)
  c3 <- key_card(teal_soft, "SAP PLANNED HOUSING",      fv("sap_planned_hh_per_acre", 1),  "HH/ac", sap_bar, "station area plan, planned units",          teal_soft, icon_fwd_list$sap)
  c4 <- key_card(amber,     "PROJECTED GROWTH 2027-37", fv("eru_per_acre", 1),             "ERU/ac",eru_bar, "equivalent residential units added",        amber,     icon_fwd_list$eru)

  fkm <- paste0(
    '#text(fill: rgb("', amber, '"), weight: "bold", size: 6.5pt, tracking: 1.4pt)[FOUR KEY MEASURES]',
    '#v(2pt)',
    '#line(length: 100%, stroke: (paint: rgb("', amber, '"), thickness: 0.5pt))',
    '#v(4pt)',
    '#grid(columns: (1fr, 1fr, 1fr, 1fr), rows: (76pt), gutter: 0.08in,',
    '[', c1, '],[', c2, '],[', c3, '],[', c4, '])'
  )

  # ── Col 2: Tract Profile panel ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  kv2 <- function(l1, v1, l2, v2) {
    paste0(
      '#grid(columns: (1fr, 1fr), gutter: 0pt,',
      '[', mkv(l1, v1), '],[', mkv(l2, v2), '])'
    )
  }
  profile_body <- paste0(
    kv2("Population",      fv("pop",         0, m = ","),
        "Households",      fv("hh",          0, m = ",")),
    kv2("Total acres",     fv("total_acres", 1),
        "Developable",     fv("dev_acres",   1)),
    kv2("OZ 1.0 overlap",  paste0(fv("oz1_acres", 1), " ac"),
        "OZ 1.0 % of tract", fv("oz1_pct",  1, "%"))
  )
  profile_panel <- panel_box(phdr("TRACT PROFILE", icon_fwd_list$profile), profile_body, fill_h = TRUE)

  # ── Col 2: Centers & Districts panel ──────────────────────────────────────────
  center_defs <- list(
    list(col = "wc_pct_metropolitan_center", lbl = "Metropolitan Ctr", clr = "#bc5f8c"),
    list(col = "wc_pct_urban_center",        lbl = "Urban Ctr",        clr = "#ec8369"),
    list(col = "wc_pct_city_center",         lbl = "City Ctr",         clr = "#f5b86e"),
    list(col = "wc_pct_neighborhood_center", lbl = "Neighborhood Ctr", clr = "#fae55c"),
    list(col = "wc_pct_employment_district", lbl = "Employment Dist.",  clr = "#d4a5c9"),
    list(col = "wc_pct_industrial_district", lbl = "Industrial Dist.",  clr = "#b8a8d8"),
    list(col = "wc_pct_retail_district",     lbl = "Retail Dist.",      clr = "#f4b8bb")
  )
  centers_bars <- paste0(
    mkv_bar("Wasatch Choice total (MUorC)", fv("wc_muc_pct", 1, "%"), muc_pct, teal),
    paste0(vapply(center_defs, function(d) {
      mkv_bar(d$lbl, fv(d$col, 1, "%"), g(d$col), d$clr)
    }, character(1)), collapse = "")
  )
  centers_body <- paste0(
    '#grid(columns: (1.5in, 1fr), gutter: 0pt, align: top,',
    '[#block(inset: (x: 6pt, top: 4pt, bottom: 4pt))',
    '[#image("', donut_fwd, '", width: 100%)',
    '#v(3pt)',
    '#text(fill: rgb("', muted_c, '"), size: 5pt)',
    '[Share of tract in each Wasatch Choice center or district]]],',
    '[', centers_bars, '])'
  )
  centers_panel <- panel_box(phdr("CENTERS & DISTRICTS (% OF TRACT)", icon_fwd_list$wc), centers_body, fill_h = TRUE)

  # ── Col 3: Housing panel ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  housing_body <- paste0(
    kv2("Total units",    fv("units_total",     0, m = ","),
        "Res. acres",     fv("res_acres_total", 1)),
    kv2("SFD acres",      fv("res_acres_sfd",   1),
        "MF / SFA acres", fv("res_acres_mf_sfa",1)),
    kv2("Poverty rate",   pvrty_str,
        "Unemployment",   unmpl_str),
    mkv("Median family income", mfi_str)
  )
  housing_panel <- panel_box(phdr("HOUSING & DEMOGRAPHICS", icon_fwd_list$housing), housing_body, fill_h = TRUE)

  # ── Col 3: Transit panel ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  transit_body <- paste0(
    mkv("Rail / BRT stops",   fv("transit_stop_count", 0)),
    mkv("SAP acres",          fv("sap_acres",          1)),
    mkv_bar("SAP % of tract", fv("sap_pct", 1, "%"), g("sap_pct"), teal_soft),
    mkv("ATO jobs (transit)", fv("ato_jobtransit", 0, m = ",")),
    mkv("ATO HHs (transit)",  fv("ato_hhtransit",  0, m = ","))
  )
  transit_panel <- panel_box(phdr("TRANSIT", icon_fwd_list$transit), transit_body, fill_h = TRUE)

  # ── Col 3: Auto Access panel ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
  auto_body <- paste0(
    mkv("Freeway exits",   fv("freeway_exit_count", 0)),
    mkv("ATO jobs (auto)", fv("ato_jobauto", 0, m = ",")),
    mkv("ATO HHs (auto)",  fv("ato_hhauto",  0, m = ","))
  )
  auto_panel <- panel_box(phdr("AUTO ACCESS", icon_fwd_list$auto), auto_body, fill_h = TRUE)

  # ── Col 3: Projected Growth panel ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  hh_plus  <- fmt_plus(g("hh_added"),   0, m = ",")
  pop_plus <- fmt_plus(g("pop_added"),  0, m = ",")
  job_plus <- fmt_plus(g("jobs_added"), 0, m = ",")
  eru_plus <- fmt_plus(g("eru_added"),  0, m = ",")
  growth_body <- paste0(
    kv2("Households added", hh_plus,  "Population added", pop_plus),
    kv2("Jobs added",       job_plus, "ERU added",        eru_plus),
    mkv_bar("ERU / acre", fv("eru_per_acre", 1), eru_bar, amber)
  )
  growth_panel <- panel_box(phdr("PROJECTED GROWTH 2027-37", icon_fwd_list$eru_panel), growth_body, fill_h = TRUE)

  # ── Col 3: transit+auto side-by-side grid (fills 1fr row, panels stretch full height) ──
  transit_auto <- paste0(
    '#block(height: 100%, width: 100%)',
    '[#grid(columns: (1fr, 1fr), rows: (1fr), gutter: 0.08in,',
    '[', transit_panel, '],[', auto_panel, '])]'
  )

  # ── Footer ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  footer <- paste0(
    '#line(length: 100%, stroke: (paint: rgb("', hair, '"), thickness: 0.5pt))',
    '#v(1pt)',
    '#grid(columns: (1fr, auto), gutter: 4pt,',
    '[#text(fill: rgb("', muted_c, '"), size: 5.5pt)',
    '[Sources: Federal OZ 2.0 eligibility, Urban Institute OZ Tool, WFRC/MAG regional data. Growth projections 2027-2037.]],',
    '[#text(fill: rgb("', muted_c, '"), size: 5.5pt)',
    '[ATO = Access to Opportunities · ERU = Equiv. Residential Unit · SAP = Station Area Plan · MUorC = Metro/Urban/City Center]])'
  )

  # ── Assemble full page ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  map_legend <- paste0(
    '#grid(columns: (auto, auto, auto), column-gutter: 8pt, align: left + horizon,',
    '[#line(length: 8pt, stroke: (paint: rgb("#0072b5"), dash: "dashed", thickness: 1.2pt))',
    '#h(2pt)#text(fill: rgb("', muted_c, '"), size: 4.5pt)[SAP buffer]],',
    '[#box(fill: rgb("#943030"), radius: 2.5pt, width: 5pt, height: 5pt)[]',
    '#h(2pt)#text(fill: rgb("', muted_c, '"), size: 4.5pt)[Rail/BRT]],',
    '[#box(fill: rgb("#3A4A5A"), width: 5pt, height: 5pt)[]',
    '#h(2pt)#text(fill: rgb("', muted_c, '"), size: 4.5pt)[Freeway exit]])'
  )
  map_cell <- paste0(
    '[#block(fill: white, ',
    'stroke: (paint: rgb("', line_cool, '"), thickness: 0.75pt), ',
    'radius: 5pt, inset: 0pt, clip: true, width: 100%)',
    '[#image("', map_fwd, '", width: 100%)',
    '#block(fill: rgb("', panel_fill, '"), width: 100%, inset: (x: 5pt, top: 3pt, bottom: 4pt))',
    '[#text(fill: rgb("', teal, '"), weight: "bold", size: 5.5pt, tracking: 0.5pt)',
    '[TRACT ', substr(geoid_str, 6, 11), ']',
    '#v(2pt)',
    map_legend, ']]]'
  )
  main_grid <- paste0(
    '#grid(columns: (3.6in, 3.0in, 1fr), rows: (378pt), gutter: 0.15in,',
    map_cell, ',',
    '[#grid(rows: (80pt, 1fr), gutter: 0.1in,',
    '[', profile_panel, '],[', centers_panel, '])],',
    '[#grid(rows: (109pt, 1fr, 96pt), gutter: 0.1in,',
    '[', housing_panel, '],[', transit_auto, '],[', growth_panel, '])])'
  )

  paste0(c(pb, hdr_band, sky_rule, "#v(4pt)", fkm, "#v(0.1in)", main_grid, "#v(0.05in)", footer), collapse = "\n")
}

# ── Emit one Typst block per tract ────────────────────────────────────────────
for (i in seq_len(nrow(county_data))) {
  tract <- county_data[i, ]
  geoid <- as.character(tract$GEOID)
  cat("``` {=typst}\n")
  cat(tract_page(tract, map_paths[[geoid]], donut_paths[[geoid]], i == 1))
  cat("\n```\n\n")
}
```
